ddls:
CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the race took place */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the race */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the race */,
  "race_type" TEXT /* Type of the race (e.g., long distance, sprint) */,
  "distance" REAL /* Approximate distance of the race */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course layout used for the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fleets" (
  "fleet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fleet */,
  "fleet_name" TEXT /* Name of the fleet */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fleet */,
  "fleet_type" TEXT /* Type of the fleet (e.g., cruiser, dinghy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fleet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boats" (
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boat */,
  "fleet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fleet the boat belongs to */,
  "boat_name" TEXT /* Name of the boat */,
  "boat_class" TEXT /* Class of the boat (e.g., Club Swan 42) */,
  "sail_number" TEXT /* Sail number of the boat */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the club associated with the boat */,
  "designer" TEXT /* Designer of the boat */,
  "builder" TEXT /* Builder of the boat */,
  "build_year" INTEGER /* Year the boat was built */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the boat */,
  "beam" REAL /* Beam of the boat */,
  "draft" REAL /* Draft of the boat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boats_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boats_fleet_id FOREIGN KEY ("fleet_id") REFERENCES fleets ("fleet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "helmspersons" (
  "helm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each helmsperson */,
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the boat being steered */,
  "helm_name" TEXT /* Full name of the helmsperson */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the helmsperson */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level of the helmsperson (e.g., beginner, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("helm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_helmspersons_boat_id FOREIGN KEY ("boat_id") REFERENCES boats ("boat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boat */,
  "elapsed_time" TEXT /* Elapsed time taken by the boat to finish the race */,
  "corrected_time" TEXT /* Corrected time after applying the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Original rating of the boat */,
  "re_rating" REAL /* Re-calibrated rating after the race */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded based on finishing position */,
  "finish_position" INTEGER /* Finishing position of the boat in the race */,
  " dns" INTEGER /* Did the boat Did Not Start (DNS)? */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_boat_id FOREIGN KEY ("boat_id") REFERENCES boats ("boat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boat this rating applies to */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Numeric value of the rating */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Date when the rating became valid */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* Date when the rating is no longer valid */,
  "rating_system" TEXT /* Rating system used (e.g., IRC, NHC) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_boat_id FOREIGN KEY ("boat_id") REFERENCES boats ("boat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the sailing club */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the club */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the club */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., official, participant, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the system was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view race results, update profile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty entry */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the result entry the penalty applies to */,
  "penalty_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the penalty (e.g., rule infringement, unsportsmanlike behavior) */,
  "penalty_value" REAL /* Value of the penalty (e.g., time added to the boat's elapsed time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES race_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protests" (
  "protest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protest entry */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the result entry the protest applies to */,
  "protest_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the protest (e.g., rule infringement, unsportsmanlike behavior) */,
  "protest_status" TEXT /* Status of the protest (e.g., pending, dismissed, upheld) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protests_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES race_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committee" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee entry */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the committee */,
  "chairperson_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the chairperson of the committee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committee_chairperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("chairperson_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
